settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your emergency card
settings.deactivateCardSub: Lost or damaged? Lock it instantly
settings.locationOnScanSub: Capture GPS coordinates when card is scanned

updates.title: {{name}}'s Profile
updates.subtitle: Keep your child's card up to date

emergency.pageSub: Control what first responders see when {{name}} card is scanned
emergency.pageSubGeneric: Control what first responders see when the card is scanned
emergency.sectionScannerDesc: Live view of what responders see
emergency.sectionAccessDesc: Set how much data is shared on scan
emergency.sectionFieldAccessDescMinimal: Only blood group and contacts available in Minimal mode
emergency.visPublicDetail: First responders see full emergency profile
emergency.visMinimalDetail: Only critical fields shown — rest are hidden
emergency.hiddenSub: Emergency info is not available to scanners
emergency.noDataSub: Fill in the emergency profile to make this useful
emergency.hiddenWarnBody: First responders will not see any emergency info. Only use this if you have another way to communicate this information.
emergency.saveFailedMsg: Could not update visibility. Please try again.
emergency.safetyNote: We recommend keeping visibility set to Public — it gives first responders the best chance to help your child.
emergency.poweredBy: Powered by RESQID Guardian  ·  Emergency use only

changePhone.title: Change Phone Number
changePhone.otpNote: A one-time password will be sent to verify your new number before the change takes effect.
changePhone.successMessage: Your phone number has been changed successfully.
changePhone.errorSend: Could not send OTP. Please try again.
changePhone.errorVerify: The code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

home.subtitle: Here's your child's card status
home.profileReadyDesc: First responders will see full info when your card is scanned.
home.profileIncompleteDesc_one: {{count}} field missing — add it so help arrives faster.
home.profileIncompleteDesc_other: {{count}} fields missing — add them so help arrives faster.
home.addContactNudge: Add an emergency contact — required for card to work
home.noScansBody: When someone scans your card, it'll show up here.
home.safetyTip: Keep your child's medical info up to date — it's what first responders see in an emergency.

qr.subtitle: Physical emergency card
qr.dragHint: Drag to tilt  ·  Tap tab or QR button to flip
qr.reportLostSub: Permanently disables this card — can't be undone
qr.unblockAlertBody: To unblock this card, please contact your school admin.
qr.activateCardSub: Enable this card so it can be scanned in emergencies
qr.requestReplacementSub: Contact your school to get a new physical card
qr.safetyTip: This card is unique to your child. The QR on the physical card links directly to their emergency profile — keep it with them at all times.
qr.glossaryActiveDesc: Card works normally. Emergency info shows when scanned.
qr.glossaryBlockedDesc: Temporarily paused by you. Unblock at any time.
qr.glossaryRevokedDesc: Permanently disabled. Request a replacement from school.
qr.glossaryExpiredDesc: Card past its valid date. Request renewal from school.
qr.descIssued: Tap Activate to enable this card
qr.descUnassigned: Contact school to set up this card
qr.revokedNotice: This card has been permanently disabled. Anyone trying to scan it will see an error.
qr.expiredNotice: This card has expired. It can no longer be scanned.
qr.unassignedNotice: Contact your school to set up this card.
qr.confirmBlockBody: This will pause all scanning for {{name}}'s card. No one will be able to scan it until you unblock it.
qr.confirmBlockWarning: Use this if the card is misplaced but not fully lost.
qr.confirmUnblockBody: This will restore normal scanning for {{name}}'s card immediately.
qr.confirmRevokeBody: This will permanently disable {{name}}'s card. Anyone who tries to scan it will see that it's been reported lost.
qr.confirmRevokeWarning: This cannot be undone. You'll need to request a new card from your school.
qr.confirmActivateBody: Once activated, {{name}}'s card will be live and can be scanned in an emergency.
qr.notAvailableBody: Card {{action}} will be available once connected to your backend.
